summary: Added JSONL rotation to MetaAwarenessTracker._appendEvent() to prevent unbounded telemetry file growth
notes: TDD fix: _appendEvent() now increments _appendCount and calls _maybeRotateJSONL() every _rotationCheckInterval appends. _maybeRotateJSONL() reads JSONL file, checks if lines exceed _maxEventLines (default 50000), and trims to _rotateKeepLines (default 40000) using atomic tmp-file rename. Constructor options: maxEventLines, rotateKeepLines, rotationCheckInterval. 1 new test verifies rotation with maxEventLines:10, rotateKeepLines:6. All 8 tests pass.
